title: Doctrin - Digital Patient Communication Platform
problem: Healthcare systems struggle with patient communication, leading to inefficient workflows, overwhelmed staff, and poor patient experience.
solution: Digital platform that streamlines patient communication, expands healthcare capacity through increased efficiency, improves medical quality, and enhances satisfaction for both staff and patients.
technology: Digital communication platform, patient intake, workflow automation
varden_fit: VERY HIGH - Patient intake and communication is core to booking journey. Could enhance pre-booking and post-booking experience. Infrastructure play.
notes: Priority for deep research. Check customer list, funding, integration capabilities.
